pr.title: Gravity Tokenizer: 1.0321 BPB via ablation leverage vocabulary optimization

output.summary: Replaces most BPE merges with ablation-leverage scored tokens using GPT-2 loss deltas while keeping the vanilla transformer unchanged.
techniques: Ablation-leverage scoring for merge token selection
GPT-2 reference model to measure downstream loss deltas
Rebuilt vocabulary while keeping baseline transformer untouched
